sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105265" key="trissa/tios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρισσ-άτιος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">η</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, poet. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τρισσός</foreign> (cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μεσσάτιος</foreign>), <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.12</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Jul.</author> </bibl>).</entryFree>
